source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The main waterline into a tall building has a pressure of 600 kPa at 5-m elevation below ground level. The building is shown in the figure. How much extra pressure does a pump need to add to ensure a waterline pressure of 200 kPa at the top floor 150 m aboveground?
